    1. AbstractResultSetToBasicFixedTypeConverter()

Class AbstractResultSetToBasicFixedTypeConverter<T>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.converter.AbstractResultSetConverter<T>
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.converter.AbstractResultSetToBasicFixedTypeConverter<T>
Type Parameters:
T -
All Implemented Interfaces:
Converter<com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.ResultSet, T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ResultSetToBigDecimalConverter, ResultSetToBigIntegerConverter, ResultSetToBooleanConverter, ResultSetToDateConverter, ResultSetToDoubleConverter, ResultSetToFloatConverter, ResultSetToInetAddressConverter, ResultSetToIntegerConverter, ResultSetToLongConverter, ResultSetToUuidConverter
public abstract class AbstractResultSetToBasicFixedTypeConverter<T> extends AbstractResultSetConverter<T>
Thin wrapper that allows subclasses to delegate conversion of the given value to a DefaultConversionService.
Author:
Matthew T. Adams
